description_long: This apartment building features a three-story structure with a prominent pitched roof made of thatch or similar material, giving it a tropical or vernacular architectural feel. The building is supported by wooden beams and columns, with open staircases and walkways visible on the front and side facades. Decorative balcony railings with intricate patterns are present on each floor, providing outdoor space for residents. The ground floor includes a covered parking area, with at least one car visible, and the building is set on a neatly trimmed grassy plot. Large windows with patterned grilles are symmetrically arranged, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The overall design combines functional urban living with traditional aesthetic elements.
description: A three-story apartment building with a thatched roof, wooden supports, decorative balconies, and covered parking on a grassy lot. The structure blends traditional and functional urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, open staircases, decorative balconies, and covered parking with a visible car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thatched roof, plain wall with minimal windows, and the covered parking area beneath the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balconies, additional windows, and the continuation of the covered parking area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open staircases, multiple balconies, and the building's structural supports.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, with each floor featuring evenly spaced windows and decorative grilles, creating a balanced and orderly appearance.
